**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be an OWNER, ADMIN, or platform super-admin. Members of the org without admin role get 403.

**Response:** `List[TenantUserResponse]` ordered by username.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Members Api Tenant Admin Members Get

get.summary: List members of the caller's organization

post.description:
Creates a User row, hashes the supplied password, and attaches the user to the caller's organization with the requested role. Optionally links the new account to an existing Creator so the user sees only their own catalog by default.

**Body (`CreateTenantUserRequest`):** `username`, `email`, `password` (plain — hashed server-side), `role` (`OWNER` / `ADMIN` / `MEMBER`, default `MEMBER`), `creator_id` (optional Creator FK), `client_access_scope` (`OWN` / `ASSIGNED` / `ALL`, default `OWN`).

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin. Conflicts on duplicate `username`/`email` return 400.

**Response:** the freshly created `TenantUserResponse`.
post.summary: Create a new member in the caller's organization

delete.description:
Detaches the user from the caller's organization (deletes the OrganizationMember row). The underlying User account is kept so audit trails and historical authorship are preserved; the user simply loses access to org data on next login.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — must be a member of caller's org. Removing the last OWNER is rejected with 400.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** `{ message: "Member removed successfully" }`.
delete.summary: Remove a member from the organization

put.description:
Patches the editable fields on a member in the caller's org: `username`, `email`, `role`, `is_active`. Use the dedicated permissions / reset-password / link-creator endpoints for those specific concerns.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — User row id; must belong to the caller's organization.
**Body (`UpdateTenantUserRequest`):** any subset of the editable fields. Unspecified fields are untouched.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** the updated `TenantUserResponse`.
put.summary: Update a member's profile or role

post.description:
Sets the explicit list of Creator IDs the member can see when their `client_access_scope` is `ASSIGNED`. The supplied list **replaces** any prior assignments; pass `[]` to clear.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — must be in caller's org.
**Body (`AssignCreatorRequest`):** `{ creator_ids: int[] }`. IDs not in the org are silently dropped.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** `{ message, assigned_creators: [{id, name}] }`.
post.summary: Replace a member's set of assigned creators

put.description:
Sets (or clears) the `linked_creator_id` on a member account so the creator can sign in and see their own catalog through the artist portal. Pass `creator_id=null` in the body to unlink.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — User row id within the caller's org.
**Body:** `{ creator_id: int | null }`.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** `{ message }`.
put.summary: Link or unlink a member to a Creator profile

patch.description:
Toggles fine-grained access flags independent of the OrganizationMember role: who can manage the artist roster and how broadly they can see client (creator) data.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — must be in caller's org.
**Body (`UpdatePermissionsRequest`):** any subset of `can_manage_roster` (bool) and `client_access_scope` (`OWN` — only their linked creator; `ASSIGNED` — explicitly assigned creators; `ALL` — everything in the org).

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** the updated `TenantUserResponse`.
patch.summary: Update a member's roster + client-access permissions

post.description:
Hashes and writes a new password for the target member. The user is **not** notified by email — surface the new password to whoever is performing the reset out-of-band.

**Path parameter:** `user_id` — target user, must be in caller's org.
**Body (`ResetPasswordRequest`):** `{ new_password }` (plain).

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER, ADMIN, or super-admin.

**Response:** `{ message: "Password reset successfully" }`.
post.summary: Force-reset a member's password

post.description:
Sends a Resend-backed invite email containing a tokenised signup link to the supplied address. The recipient becomes an OrganizationMember with the requested role once they accept. Safe to call multiple times — a fresh token is issued each call.

**Path parameter:** `org_id` — target Organization ID.
**Body:** `{ email, role?, message? }`. `role` defaults to `MEMBER`.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT. Caller must be OWNER/ADMIN of `org_id`, or a platform super-admin.

**Response:** `{ success: true, message }`.
post.summary: Email an invitation to join an organization

get.description:
Renders the catalog valuation report as an Excel workbook for download.

**Query:** `org_id`, `discount_rate?`, `multiple?`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet` download.
get.summary: Download catalog valuation report as Excel file

get.description:
Returns the comprehensive catalog valuation summary used by the valuation dashboard (NPV band, multiples, top contributors, last underwriting run).

**Query:** `org_id` (defaults to caller's current org), `discount_rate?`, `multiple?`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `{ npv_cents, low_high_band: [low, high], multiple_value_cents, top_contributors: [...], last_run_at }`.
get.summary: Get comprehensive catalog valuation summary for the organization

get.description:
Returns detailed valuation information for a specific song (cashflow history, decay fit, NPV breakdown).

**Path parameter:** `song_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the song's org.
**Response:** `{ song_id, title, npv_cents, historical: [{period, cents}], projected: [{period, cents}], decay: {a, k, r2}, share_of_catalog_pct }`.
get.summary: Get detailed valuation information for a specific song

get.description:
Returns the underwriting-side reconciliation for a specific RoyaltyStatement (matched vs. unmatched cashflow, valuation adjustments).

**Path parameter:** `statement_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the statement's org.
**Response:** `{ statement_id, reported_total, matched_total, valuation_delta }`.
get.summary: Get the reconciliation snapshot tied to a statement

get.description:
Convenience endpoint that returns the most recent completed run headline so dashboards don't have to list-then-fetch.

**Query:** `org_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** same shape as `/runs/{run_id}` or `null` if no run exists yet.
get.summary: Get the latest underwriting run for the org

post.description:
Kicks off the underwriting engine which produces a snapshot of the catalog's value: spine groupings, decay fits, concentration metrics. Synchronous; returns when complete.

**Body:** `{ org_id: int, params?: {discount_rate, horizon_years, ...} }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `{ run_id, status, started_at, completed_at }`.
post.summary: Trigger a fresh underwriting run on the catalog

get.description:
Returns the audit trail of `/run` invocations.

**Query:** `org_id`, `limit`, `offset`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `{ runs: [{id, started_at, completed_at, params, npv_cents, status}] }`.
get.summary: List historical underwriting runs

get.description:
Returns the run's summary numbers: NPV, multiples, top contributors, model parameters.

**Path parameter:** `run_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the run's org.
**Response:** `{ id, params, summary: {...}, top_contributors: [...], completed_at }`.
get.summary: Get the headline result of a single underwriting run

get.description:
How concentrated catalog earnings are in a small set of songs/creators (HHI, top-N share, Gini coefficient).

**Path parameter:** `run_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the run's org.
**Response:** `{ hhi, top10_share_pct, gini, top_concentrations: [...] }`.
get.summary: Get the concentration risk metrics for an underwriting run

get.description:
Returns the per-cohort exponential decay parameters used to project earnings.

**Path parameter:** `run_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the run's org.
**Response:** `{ fits: [{cohort_label, a, k, r2, data_points}] }`.
get.summary: Get the decay-curve fits from an underwriting run

get.description:
The "spine" is the cohort grouping used by the model — returns per-cohort cashflows, weights, and projected NPV.

**Path parameter:** `run_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the run's org.
**Response:** `{ spine: [{cohort_label, weight, historical: [...], projected: [...], npv_cents}] }`.
get.summary: Get the spine breakdown of an underwriting run

delete.description:
Deletes a folder. Works inside the folder are moved to the parent (or root). Empty subfolders are deleted recursively.

**Path parameter:** `folder_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the folder's org.
**Response:** `{ success: true, moved_works: int }`.

put.description:
Updates a folder's name and/or parent. Cycles are prevented.

**Path parameter:** `folder_id`.
**Body:** `{ name?, parent_id? }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the folder's org.
**Response:** the updated folder.

get.description:
Returns the org's compositions (Works) with optional text search.

**Path parameter:** `org_id`.
**Query:** `q`, `status` (`pending|approved|rejected`), `creator_id`, `folder_id`, `limit`, `offset`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `{ total, works: [{id, title, status, iswc, writer_count, track_count, created_at}] }`.
get.summary: List works in an organization

post.description:
Creates a new composition (Work). Defaults to `PENDING` approval.

**Path parameter:** `org_id`.
**Body:** `{ title, iswc?, alternate_titles?, language?, credits?: [{name, role, share_pct?}] }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** the created Work with `status="pending"`.
post.summary: Create a work

get.description:
Returns the folder hierarchy used to organize the works grid (genre buckets, project folders, etc.).

**Path parameter:** `org_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** `{ folders: [{id, name, parent_id, work_count}] }`.
get.summary: List the work folders for the org

post.description:
Adds a folder under an optional parent.

**Path parameter:** `org_id`.
**Body:** `{ name: string, parent_id?: int }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the org.
**Response:** the created folder.
post.summary: Create a new work folder

delete.description:
Removes the work and its associated track / credit links.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ success: true }`.

get.description:
Returns the work, its tracks (linked Songs), credit splits, and approval status.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ work: {...}, tracks: [{song_id, title, isrc}], credits: [...], splits: [...], status, approved_by, approved_at }`.
get.summary: Get work detail

put.description:
Patches Work fields. Mutating an `APPROVED` work generates an audit row.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** any subset of writable Work fields.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** the updated Work.

post.description:
Owner/Admin marks a `PENDING` work `APPROVED` and clears the related action item.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** `{ note?: string }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be Owner or Admin of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ work_id, status: "approved", approved_by, approved_at }`.
post.summary: Approve a work

post.description:
Attaches a writer/contributor credit to a Work with role and share. Used to build out the writer split sheet.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** `{ contact_id?: int, name?: string, role: string, share_pct?: number, ipi?: string, pro_society?: string }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** the created credit.
post.summary: Add a credit to a work

delete.description:
Detaches a writer/contributor credit from the Work.

**Path parameters:** `work_id`, `credit_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ success: true }`.
delete.summary: Remove a credit from a work

put.description:
Sets the work's `folder_id`. Pass `null` to move to root.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** `{ folder_id: int | null }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** the updated work.
put.summary: Move a work into a different folder

post.description:
Owner/Admin rejects a `PENDING` work with a reason and notifies the submitter.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** `{ reason: string }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be Owner or Admin of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ work_id, status: "rejected", rejected_by, rejected_at, reason }`.
post.summary: Reject a work

post.description:
Connects a Song to its underlying Work so royalty processing can correctly route earnings against the Work's RightsSplits.

**Path parameter:** `work_id`.
**Body:** `{ song_id: int }`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ work_id, song_id, linked_at }`.
post.summary: Link a Song (recording) to a Work (composition)

delete.description:
Removes the song↔work link.

**Path parameters:** `work_id`, `song_id`.
**Auth:** Bearer JWT — caller must be a member of the work's org.
**Response:** `{ success: true }`.
delete.summary: Unlink a Song from a Work

get.description:
Unauthenticated health endpoint for uptime monitors and load
balancer probes. Reports real DB connectivity (executes SELECT 1).
get.summary: Liveness + DB connectivity probe
Serve Spa
